articles.description: Follow Wednesday's action from the last 16 of the Champions League.
articles.title: Champions League LIVE: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal, PSG vs Chelsea, Real Madrid vs Manchester City & Bodo/Glimt vs Sporting - radio, scores & text updates

articles.description: Following Tottenham's 5-2 defeat at Atletico Madrid in the Champions League, BBC Sport assesses the options open to the beleaguered club.
articles.title: Tottenham manager: 'Wrong person at wrong time' - but if not Tudor then who?

articles.description: Micky Van de Ven says Tottenham found themselves in a "doomsday scenario" against Atletico Madrid, adding the club is "just taking blow after blow".
articles.title: Tottenham: Club in 'doomsday scenario' and being hit by 'blow after blow', says Micky Van de Ven

articles.description: German cross-country skiers turn their backs on the Russian gold medallists on the Winter Paralympics podium in protest against the nation's inclusion at the Games.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: Germans protest against Russia during medal ceremony

articles.description: Listen to BBC Radio 5 Sports Extra commentary and follow live text updates from day two of the Cheltenham Festival.
articles.title: Cheltenham Festival 2026 LIVE: Day 2 races, results, radio & updates on Champion Chase & Ladies Day

articles.description: Iran is not in a position to participate in the 2026 World Cup, says the country's Minister of Sports and Youth.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Iranian sports minister says country will not play in tournament

articles.description: All-rounder Danielle Gibson, pace bowler Issy Wong and 18-year-old spinner Tilly Cortneen-Coleman receive deals in excess of £100,000 in the inaugural Hundred auction.
articles.title: Hundred auction: Danielle Gibson, Issy Wong & Tilly Cortneen-Coleman among big sales

articles.description: The Miami Heat's Bam Adebayo scores 83 points in a game, surpassing Kobe Bryant and second only to the great Wilt Chamberlain.
articles.title: NBA: Bam Adebayo scores 83 points as Miami Heat beat Washington Wizards

articles.description: Guillem Balague analyses the rise of Paris St-Germain's Georgian superstar Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.
articles.title: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia: How PSG's Georgia winger became a Champions League winner

articles.description: Afghanistan's upcoming series against Sri Lanka in the United Arab Emirates has been postponed until the end of the year because of conflict in the Middle East.
articles.title: Afghanistan v Sri Lanka series in UAE postponed
